build.//: Angular dev server (see apps/desktop/package.json `start`) must serve on 1420 for `tauri dev`. The Angular project should set `ng serve --port 1420`.
build.//frontendDist: angular.json sets outputPath=dist (no project subfolder), so the application builder emits assets to apps/desktop/dist/browser. Relative to this file (src-tauri/).
build.//beforeDevCommand: Started separately via scripts/dev.sh (pnpm dev). Leave empty so `tauri dev` does not also try to boot the Angular server.

security.//csp: Permissive enough for the Angular UI to talk to localhost HTTP services and open an EventSource (SSE) to the orchestrator. connect-src must list both http and ws origins for 127.0.0.1 / localhost on the worker ports (5100-5103). ipc:/tauri: are required for Tauri 2 IPC.
security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:5100 http://127.0.0.1:5101 http://127.0.0.1:5102 http://127.0.0.1:5103 http://localhost:5100 http://localhost:5101 http://localhost:5102 http://localhost:5103 ws://127.0.0.1:5100 ws://localhost:5100

plugins.//: Plugin runtime config. Permissions are granted via capabilities/default.json, not here.

bundle.//icon: Tauri requires at least these icon files to build a bundle. Generate them with `pnpm tauri icon path/to/source.png` (see icons/README.md). Placeholders are referenced here; the dev build (`tauri dev`) does NOT strictly require all of them, but a release bundle does.
bundle.shortDescription: Dub videos into another language, locally.
bundle.longDescription: VideoDubber is an offline-first desktop app that transcribes, translates, and re-voices videos into a target language using local STT/MT/TTS engines.
